plainLanguage: This is a controlled private pilot only after approvals pass.
participantChoice: Participants can ask questions before joining.

plainLanguage: It is not an official Toastmasters record system or public consultation.
Only approved private authority owners can approve real participation.
participantChoice: Participants can request authority contact privately.

plainLanguage: Only approved minimum data is collected privately.
participantChoice: Participants can ask what is collected.

plainLanguage: Public demo does not collect real names, emails, member numbers, payments, or signatures.
participantChoice: Participants should not enter real data publicly.

plainLanguage: Consent, withdrawal, and support route are handled privately.
Support and pause routes are available before real intake.

participantChoice: Participants use official channel for official records.
Participants can ask who can see data.

plainLanguage: Retention and deletion follow private data governance approval.
participantChoice: Participants can ask for deletion path.

plainLanguage: Public updates are aggregate and fake/sample safe.
Complaints, incidents, and affected-person details stay private.
participantChoice: Participants can use private complaint route.
